person.name: Andrew Drysdale
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary: Andrew Drysdale (Drisdale, Dryisdale) was a tenant in Harviestoun before his death circa 1490

zh.lifeSummary: 當Andrew Drysdale於大約1437年出生在蘇格蘭可拉可曼南史爾提利其爾崔時，他的父親Mr Drysdale29歲，母親Margaret Morice26歲。他和Margaret Drysdale至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1490年在他的家鄉享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Andrew Drysdale于大约1437年出生在苏格兰可拉可曼南史爾提利其爾崔时，他的父亲Mr Drysdale29岁，母亲Margaret Morice26岁。他和Margaret Drysdale至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于大约1490年在他的家乡享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Drysdale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dryfesdale near Dumfries (which is normally pronounced Drysdale), named from the river Dryfe + Old English dæl ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

en.lifeSummary: When Andrew Drysdale was born about 1437, in Tillicoultry, Clackmannanshire, Scotland, his father, Mr Drysdale, was 29 and his mother, Margaret Morice, was 26. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Margaret Drysdale. He died about 1490, in his hometown, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Andrew Drysdale est né environ 1437, à Tillicoultry, Clackmannanshire, Écosse, son père, Mr Drysdale, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margaret Morice, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Margaret Drysdale. Il est décédé environ 1490, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Andrew Drysdale um 1437 in Tillicoultry, Clackmannanshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Mr Drysdale 29 und seine Mutter Margaret Morice 26. Er hatte mit Margaret Drysdale mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1490 im Alter von 55 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew Drysdale è nato il circa 1437 nel Tillicoultry, Clackmannanshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Mr Drysdale, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Morice, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Margaret Drysdale. Morì circa 1490, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Andrew Drysdaleが約1437年にスコットランドクラクマナンシュアイアティリコウルトリーで生まれた時，父Mr Drysdaleは29歳，母Margaret Moriceは26歳であった。彼はMargaret Drysdaleとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1490年に故郷で55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Andrew Drysdale(이)가 대략 1437년 스컷랜드 클랙먼아실르 틸리콜트리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Mr Drysdale(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Morice(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Margaret Drysdale(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1490년 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1437–about 1490: tany ho any amin'ny 1437–tany ho any amin'ny 1490

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew Drysdale nasceu aproximadamente 1437, em Tillicoultry, Clackmannanshire, Scotland, seu pai, Mr Drysdale, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Morice, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Margaret Drysdale. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1490, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Andrew Drysdale родился около 1437 г. в местности тилликоултри, клаккманнаньшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Mr Drysdale было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Morice, 26. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Margaret Drysdale. Он умер около 1490 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет.

sm.about 1437–about 1490: e tusa o le 1437–e tusa o le 1490

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Andrew Drysdale nació aproximadamente 1437, en Tillicoultry, Clackmannanshire, Scotland, su papá, Mr Drysdale, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Margaret Morice, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Margaret Drysdale. Murió aproximadamente 1490, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años.
